text: The clean lines and reflective surfaces of this space evoke a sense of modernity and curiosity in me. Through the glass, I see a bright, stimulating exhibit full of vibrant colors and words, inviting me to engage and reflect. As I step closer, I feel anticipation—a readiness to absorb new knowledge and contemplate the interplay between technology, research, and our human experience. There’s an atmosphere of thoughtful innovation here, encouraging inquiry and open-mindedness.
